data.name: operations.error.workOrder.alreadyExistsForAppointment
data.value: A work order already exists for the scheduled appointment.

data.name: operations.error.workOrder.cannotModifyClosedOrder
data.value: Cannot modify a completed or paid work order.

data.name: operations.error.workOrder.cannotDeleteCompletedTask
data.value: Cannot delete a completed task. Reopen it first to make modifications.

data.name: operations.error.workOrder.cannotDeletePaidOrder
data.value: Cannot delete a paid work order.

data.name: operations.error.workOrder.cannotReopenTaskOfPaidOrder
data.value: Cannot reopen tasks belonging to a paid work order.

data.name: operations.error.workOrder.pendingTasksExist
data.value: Cannot complete the work order because there are still pending tasks.

data.name: operations.error.task.notFound
data.value: Task not found in the work order.

data.name: operations.error.taskProduct.notFound
data.value: Product/part assignment not found in this task.

data.name: operations.error.task.cannotModifyCompletedTask
data.value: Cannot modify a completed task. Reopen it first to make modifications.

data.name: operations.error.quantity.mustBeGreaterThanZero
data.value: Product quantity must be greater than zero.

data.name: operations.error.taskDescription.required
data.value: Task description is required and cannot be blank.

data.name: operations.error.taskDescription.tooShort
data.value: Task description is too short (minimum 10 characters).

data.name: operations.error.taskDescription.tooLong
data.value: Task description is too long (maximum 1000 characters).

data.name: operations.error.diagnosticSummary.notBlank
data.value: Diagnostic summary is required and cannot be blank.

data.name: operations.error.diagnosticSummary.tooLong
data.value: Diagnostic summary is too long (maximum 2000 characters).

data.name: operations.error.resource.diagnosticSummary.size
data.value: Diagnostic summary must be between 5 and 2000 characters.

data.name: operations.error.resource.description.size
data.value: Task description must be between 5 and 1000 characters.

data.name: operations.error.resource.quantity.invalid
data.value: Product quantity must be at least 1.

data.name: operations.error.appointmentId.duplicate
data.value: A work order already exists for this appointment.

data.name: operations.error.unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing the operation.

data.name: operations.error.address.notBlank
data.value: Address is required and cannot be blank.

data.name: operations.error.workOrderTaskId.required
data.value: Work Order Task ID is required.

data.name: operations.error.workOrderTaskProductId.required
data.value: Work Order Task Product ID is required.
